hero.subtitle: For over fifteen years we have accompanied pilgrims to Makkah and Madinah with reverence, comfort, and meticulous care, so your heart can remain where it belongs.

media.alt: Gora Belu Travel serving pilgrims at the Haram

verse.translation: “And proclaim to the people the Hajj.”

about.title: A trust, not a transaction
body: To carry a believer to the House of Allah is a sacred amānah. We treat every itinerary, every meal, and every step between the Haramayn as an act of service.
Our guides are scholars and seasoned travellers who walk beside you, easing the logistics so you may give your full presence to worship.

highlights.title: Scholar-led groups
highlights.text: Every journey is accompanied by a qualified guide for rites, du'ā and reflection.

highlights.title: Steps from the Haram
highlights.text: Hand-selected hotels within walking distance of Masjid al-Haram and the Prophet's Mosque.

highlights.title: Effortless logistics
highlights.text: Visas, transfers, ihram support and ziyārat, all arranged and included.

journey.title: Every step, accompanied
journey.subtitle: From your first enquiry to your return home, we remain at your side.

steps.title: Intention & Consultation
steps.text: We listen to your needs and recommend the package that suits your pace, budget and devotion.

steps.title: Preparation & Documents
steps.text: Visa processing, vaccinations guidance and a pre-departure briefing on the rites of Hajj & Umrah.

steps.title: Arrival in the Holy Lands
steps.text: Met at the airport and welcomed to your hotel beside the Haram, with full assistance into ihram.

steps.title: Worship & Ziyārat
steps.text: Guided performance of the rites, plus visits to the blessed historical sites of Makkah and Madinah.

steps.title: Return, transformed
steps.text: A serene departure and continued du'ā that your pilgrimage is accepted. Hajj Mabrūr.

packages.title: Choose the journey that calls you
packages.subtitle: Transparent, all-inclusive packages for Hajj and Umrah. Final pricing is confirmed at consultation.

items.name: Umrah Serenity
items.summary: An intimate Umrah for those seeking a quiet, focused retreat.

items.name: Umrah Noor
items.summary: Elevated comfort with closer hotels and a smaller group.

items.name: Hajj Mabrūr
items.summary: A complete, comfortable Hajj with experienced group leaders.

items.name: Hajj Khāssa
items.summary: Our most refined Hajj, offering proximity, privacy and unhurried care.

features.title: Proximity to the Haram
features.text: Hotels chosen for their nearness, so your time is spent in worship, not in transit.

features.title: Knowledgeable guides
features.text: Scholars who teach the rites gently and answer every question with patience.

features.title: Fully accredited
features.text: IATA accredited and approved by the Ministry of Hajj & Umrah, so your trust is protected.

features.title: Care for every pilgrim
features.text: Special attention for elderly travellers, families, and those journeying for the first time.

features.title: Spiritual companionship
features.text: Daily reflections, group du'ā and a sense of brotherhood and sisterhood throughout.

features.title: Always reachable
features.text: A 24/7 on-ground team in Makkah and Madinah, plus a single point of contact at home.

items.caption: Longing for the Rawdah

items.quote: From the moment we landed, every detail was handled with such care. I could finally focus only on my worship. May Allah reward this team.
items.name: Aisha R.

items.quote: My elderly parents performed Hajj with complete peace of mind. The guides were patient, gentle and deeply knowledgeable. Truly a Hajj Mabrūr.
items.name: Yusuf K.

items.quote: The hotel was steps from the Haram and the group felt like family. I have already recommended Gora Belu to everyone I know.
items.name: Fatima S.

items.q: What is the difference between Hajj and Umrah?
items.a: Hajj is the obligatory pilgrimage performed during specific days of Dhul-Hijjah and is one of the five pillars of Islam. Umrah, often called the 'lesser pilgrimage', can be performed at any time of the year. We offer guided packages for both.

items.q: Do you handle visas and documentation?
items.a: Yes. Hajj and Umrah visas, along with all required documentation and guidance on vaccinations, are arranged for you as part of every package.

items.q: How close are the hotels to the Haram?
items.a: Hotel proximity varies by package tier, from a short walk to direct Haram views. Each package page lists the distance clearly, and we are happy to show you on a map.

items.q: Can you accommodate elderly or first-time pilgrims?
items.a: Absolutely. We provide additional support for elderly travellers, wheelchair assistance where needed, and detailed briefings so first-time pilgrims feel fully prepared.
Yes. Flexible deposit and instalment options are available. Speak with one of our guides to arrange a plan that suits you.

cta.title: The House of Allah is calling
cta.subtitle: Let us carry the details, so you may carry only your intention. Speak with a dedicated guide today.

contact.title: Let us plan your pilgrimage
contact.subtitle: Share a few details and a dedicated guide will reach out within one working day, inshā'Allah.
